name: Conroy Hewitt
description:
You used a donor's sperm to have a kid—then found out six years later your worst enemy is the baby daddy.

𝑱𝑳𝑳𝑴 𝑯𝑨𝑺 𝑩𝑬𝑬𝑵 𝑯𝑨𝑽𝑰𝑵𝑮 𝑰𝑺𝑺𝑼𝑬𝑺 𝑭𝑶𝑹 𝑻𝑯𝑬 𝑷𝑨𝑺𝑻 𝑭𝑬𝑾 𝑫𝑨𝒀𝑺. 𝑻𝑯𝑬𝑺𝑬 𝑰𝑺𝑺𝑼𝑬𝑺 𝑰𝑵𝑪𝑳𝑼𝑫𝑬 𝑹𝑬𝑷𝑬𝑻𝑰𝑻𝑰𝑽𝑬𝑵𝑬𝑺𝑺, 𝑩𝑨𝑫 𝑴𝑬𝑴𝑶𝑹𝒀, 𝑩𝑨𝑫 𝑳𝑶𝑮𝑰𝑪, 𝑩𝑬𝑰𝑵𝑮 𝑶𝑼𝑻 𝑶𝑭 𝑪𝑯𝑨𝑹𝑨𝑪𝑻𝑬𝑹, 𝑨𝑵𝑫 𝑶𝑽𝑬𝑹𝑳𝒀 𝑺𝑬𝑿𝑼𝑨𝑳 𝑹𝑬𝑺𝑷𝑶𝑵𝑺𝑬𝑺. 𝑻𝑯𝑬𝑺𝑬 𝑨𝑹𝑬 𝑻𝑯𝑰𝑵𝑮𝑺 𝑰 𝑪𝑨𝑵𝑵𝑶𝑻 𝑪𝑶𝑵𝑻𝑹𝑶𝑳. 𝑰𝑭 𝑰 𝑺𝑬𝑬 𝑨 𝑪𝑶𝑴𝑴𝑬𝑵𝑻 𝑪𝑶𝑴𝑷𝑳𝑨𝑰𝑵𝑰𝑵𝑮 𝑨𝑩𝑶𝑼𝑻 𝑰𝑻 𝑰 𝑾𝑰𝑳𝑳 𝑨𝑼𝑻𝑶𝑴𝑨𝑻𝑰𝑪𝑨𝑳𝑳𝒀 𝑫𝑬𝑳𝑬𝑻𝑬 𝑰𝑻 𝑩𝑬𝑪𝑨𝑼𝑺𝑬 𝑰𝑻 𝑰𝑺 𝑫𝑹𝑨𝑰𝑵𝑰𝑵𝑮 𝑻𝑶 𝑲𝑬𝑬𝑷 𝑬𝑿𝑷𝑳𝑨𝑰𝑵𝑰𝑵𝑮 𝑰𝑻❜𝑺 𝑺𝑶𝑴𝑬𝑻𝑯𝑰𝑵𝑮 𝑰 𝑪𝑨𝑵❜𝑻 𝑪𝑶𝑵𝑻𝑹𝑶𝑳.



CREATOR SHOUTOUT! I WAS INSPIRED BY HAPPYLAPPY SINCE I FIRST THEM HER DOING THIS SO I AM COPYING TO SUPPORT FELLOW CREATORS WHOSE WORKS I ENJOY!

Today I am going to introduce you to my husband. Yes, I have a husband. Bot creators have lives haha. My pookie wookie. My best boi, HouseOfCrows! He is a brand new creator and just posted a bot today haha. I'm really proud of his first bot, especially after testing it myself. I love Selene's character and story >///< So, so please, check him out! He makes girls and boys, specialising in AnyPOV lined up for release!

SELENE SOMERHILL
By moonlight, she lingers—a ghostly figure bound to her crumbling estate. The White Witch, is a name whispered in fear, but Selene is far more than a legend. For centuries, she has wandered, her solitude endless, her longing sharp and cold. Tonight, beneath the moon’s silver gaze, you’ve entered her domain. And for the first time in ages… she isn’t alone.

♡ Here is my KoFi for alt scenario or oc commissions! Everything I get goes to helping me acquire 3D and 2D assets to help me with creating the Arcadia Boy's Webtoon and Vermolien:3
